prompt: A vast aerial view of thousands of tiny human figures densely packed together across a dark landscape. When viewed as a whole, their collective arrangement forms the unmistakable shape of a single serene, smiling face — glowing warmly with soft golden light, peaceful and unified. But at close inspection, each individual figure is isolated, hunched, turning away from the others, their body language expressing confusion, loneliness, or conflict. 4K, ultra high resolution, square format. No text, no numbers, no labels, no charts.
visual_logic: A crowd whose macro-arrangement forms a serene unified face, while each individual within it is isolated and contradictory — the group truth and individual truth are simultaneously visible and irreconcilable.
